export function canMutate(role){return role==="admin"||role==="developer"||role==="sysadmin";}export function canCodeWrite(role){return role==="admin"||role==="developer";}export const ROLE_LABEL={admin:"Admin",pm:"PM",developer:"Developer",sysadmin:"Sysadmin",agent:"Agent"};
